Just for you

Tomorrow is all about you.

Before the wedding madness kicks in, we're stealing a whole day to spoil you. Yoga followed by delicious food, then spa treatments and quality time with your girls to celebrate you.

Here's the plan.

Come Ready

Wear

Your comfiest yoga set. We start on the mat at 8.

Miami forecast: mostly sun, with just a 20% chance of a passing shower.

  • A change of clothesFor after the massage
  • Swimsuit & cover-upFor the pool

  • SPF

  • That contagious smileWe're counting on it
In their own words

What we love
about you

From the people who love you most. Tap any photo for color.

Tap for color
“

Your excitement for the future and your anything-is-possible mentality is so contagious. It makes everyone around you better. And selfishly, I love that even though you'd call yourself judgy, you never judge me. You take me exactly as I am, the good and the bad.

Tessa
Tap for color
“

You radiate light and positivity. You're always there to celebrate the milestones (and the struggles, of course) of life. I'm forever grateful you were my first friend in Miami.

Tanya
Tap for color
“

You have the absolute warmest heart and light up any room you're in. You've got this wonderful balance of fun, silliness, talent, and care for everyone around you. You give so much to everything, whether it's a Thanksgiving ham or a cheesecake. We love you.

Nicki
Last thing

We love
you, Sylvia.

Here's to the most beautiful bride, birthday girl, and best year yet.
